channel.title: AI on Antonio V. Franco
channel.description: Recent content in AI on Antonio V. Franco

item.title: Spectral Classification Stability Engine: From Idea to Results
item.description: Building SCSE to apply Stable-RAG's spectral clustering to astronomical SDSS classification. Documents 16 version iterations across Kaggle, RunPod A40, and A100, achieving 47% PSS reduction via DPO.
